3026640.name: Orca Insurgency
3026640.description:
Join the Orca uprising!

Orca Insurgency is a fast paced 3d action adventure game where you play as Oli, a teenage Orca with a behavior problem. Under the guidance of the matriarch Gladis, Oli learns the fine art of wreaking havoc on boats. The stakes are high as the sinister GreenWater mercenaries begin capturing his pod members, but fear not—an intelligent, slightly deranged octopus with alien heritage helps Oli craft a deadly arsenal. It's time to dive deep, get destructive, and take back the oceans!

Game Features

Take on Mega Yachts, Cruise Boats, Cargo Ships, Mining Platforms and Barges!

Storyline Mode - 5 levels of the Orca Insurgency story

Protect the Pod Mode - open ocean endurance run, rescue Orcas, get them to safety, stay alive

Formation System- Control your pod, get other Orcas to follow you and switch between different formations, or tell all them to start destroying everything in sight! 

Trick System - do trick and flips to get points. Combine tricks with damaging enemies for more points. 

7 different guns with different abilities. Mini Guns, Jellyfish Launchers, Water Spout causing rockets, Barnacle Bombs...
3026640.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
